description: Create a content slide on risk management technology priorities with a two-column layout: explanatory text on the left and a horizontal bar chart on the right showing top priorities over the next three to five years.

left.body: AI and automation are increasingly shifting risk oversight from periodic review to continuous, real-time visibility and faster, self-service risk insights for the business. As digital fluency becomes more important, CROs are leveraging technology to strengthen insights, sharpen decision-making and support scalable risk management capabilities.

right.title: Figure 7: What are your organization’s top priorities in risk management technology solutions and capabilities over the next three to five years?

series.label: Development of a central risk data hub
Too early to tell; we haven’t taken or made any decisions to accelerate our risk management technology capabilities as of yet
